query: SELECT `id`, `poNumber`, `vendorName`, `backupLabel`, `productCount`, `restoredAt`, `restoredByUserId`, `createdAt` FROM `import_batch_backups` WHERE `poNumber` = 'PO-20260508-01' ORDER BY `id` DESC;
